title: dev chore: update all non-distilled detailers to CFG 1.5
description:
CHORE (2026-07-17): MaskDetailer (Impact Pack) gave bad results on KREA2 raw. Root cause = detailer CFG too high. The raw KREA2 gen runs CFG 3, which is correct full-frame, but inside a MaskDetailer's small denoised crop that guidance is way too strong. Landed on ~CFG 1.5 for the KREA2 raw detailer. Tell for future: bad detailer result that is DENOISE-INVARIANT (same bad at 0.1 / 0.2 / 0.4) = suspect CFG-in-crop, not sampler/scheduler/steps/guide_size. See memory project_detailer_cfg_lower_than_gen.

TASK: lower CFG toward ~1.5 on all NON-DISTILLED detailers, but TEST EACH INDIVIDUALLY — the sweet spot is per-model, may be KREA2-only. Do NOT bulk-edit.

Audit (comfy_workflows/raw/*detailer*, 2026-07-17): only krea2_detailer_template.json ships CFG 3 (steps 20, euler/beta). Distilled/turbo already correct — leave: krea2_turbo_detailer (cfg 1), chroma_detailer (cfg 1), chroma_hyper_detailer (cfg 1), sdxl_detailer (cfg 1.4, lcm).

SHIP MECHANIC: raw/ is user-owned — user edits CFG live in LiteGraph + live-save, OR patch raw JSON then sync-raw-workflows to regen runtime. Param change on a template = re-sync runtime files.
